testsuite.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the create course form
testcase.classname: should show the create course form

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the course name input
testcase.classname: should show the course name input

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the description input
Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the image upload button
testcase.classname: should show the image upload button

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the submit button
Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the course type radio buttons
testcase.classname: should show the course type radio buttons

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the location select
Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the date input
Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the time start input
testcase.classname: should show the time start input

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the time end input
testcase.classname: should show the time end input

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the teacher input
Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the phone input
Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form visibility should show the email input

testsuite.name: Create course form and see it added to the list

testcase.name: Test 2 - Create a course and verify it appears in the course list Create course form and see it added to the list should create a course and see it in the list
testcase.classname: should create a course and see it in the list

testcase.name: Test 3 - Upload Image should upload an image and see it in the course preview
testcase.classname: should upload an image and see it in the course preview

testsuite.name: Test 1 - Login and verify home page

testcase.name: Test 1 - Login and verify home page should redirect to /overview after login
Test 1 - Login and verify home page should show the navigation bar
Test 1 - Login and verify home page should show the enroll button
Test 1 - Login and verify home page should show the enrolled button
Test 1 - Login and verify home page should show the create course button
testcase.classname: should show the create course button

testcase.name: Test 1 - Login and verify home page should show an empty course list when no courses are visible
testcase.classname: should show an empty course list when no courses are visible
